title: Portal Cubed
body:
# Portal Cubed

### ---

## UNDER (RE)CONSTRUCTION

![UNDER CONSTRUCTION](https://i.imgur.com/qILbJ9V.png "UNDER CONSTRUCTION")

### Portal Cubed is a heavily work-in-progress Portal mod for Minecraft.  It is currently being rewritten from the ground up, so most of the older versions have been removed and are no longer available to download.  This page will be restored and refreshed once the new versions enter betas and start being published to mod hosting sites - for the time being, you can join our discord for progress updates.

### ---

## Discord Server
[![Discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-plural_vector.svg "Discord")](https://discord.gg/YyrsVRNBA8 "Discord")
